predicate_mappings.assigned_specialist: the referral case {} is assigned to the specialist provider {}
predicate_mappings.case_specialist_assigned: a specialist is assigned to the referral case {}
predicate_mappings.admin_coordinator_reserved_flag: the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case {}
predicate_mappings.diagnostic_test_reserved: a diagnostic test {} is reserved for {}
predicate_mappings.service_appointment_created: a service appointment for {} is created for {}
predicate_mappings.patient_notified_of_appointment: the patient for {} has been notified of the appointment
predicate_mappings.eligible_specialist_for_case: {} is an eligible specialist for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_organizational_unit: {} is assigned to the organizational unit {}
predicate_mappings.subtype_timeslot_compatible: {} has a subtype that is compatible with {}
predicate_mappings.admin_coordinator_assigned: {} is assigned as the admin coordinator for {}

preconditions: I can only register a referral case A if it is not the case that the referral case A is registered and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I register a referral case A, it is the case that the referral case A is registered

assign_specialist_to_case.description: assign a specialist provider B to a referral case A
preconditions: I can only assign a specialist provider B to a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and B is available and B is an eligible specialist for the case A
I can only assign a specialist provider B to a referral case A if it is not the case that a specialist is assigned to the referral case A
effects: Once I assign a specialist provider B to a referral case A, it is the case that the referral case A is assigned to the specialist provider B and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A
Once I assign a specialist provider B to a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_specialist_from_case.description: unassign a specialist provider B from a referral case A
preconditions: I can only unassign a specialist provider B from a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is assigned to the specialist provider B
I can only unassign a specialist provider B from a referral case A if it is not the case that the appointment for A is confirmed and it is not the case that clinical authorization is granted for A
effects: Once I unassign a specialist provider B from a referral case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign a specialist provider B from a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that the referral case A is assigned to the specialist provider B and it is not the case anymore that a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and it is not the case anymore that the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case A and it is not the case anymore that clinical authorization is obtained for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires an administrative hold and it is not the case anymore that the appointment for A is finalized and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

reserve_admin_coordinator.description: reserve an admin coordinator B for a referral case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an admin coordinator B for a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I reserve an admin coordinator B for a referral case A, it is the case that B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A
Once I reserve an admin coordinator B for a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_admin_coordinator.description: release an admin coordinator B from a referral case A
preconditions: I can only release an admin coordinator B from a referral case A if it is the case that B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A
effects: Once I release an admin coordinator B from a referral case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an admin coordinator B from a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A

confirm_admin_reservation.description: confirm admin reservation for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B
preconditions: I can only confirm admin reservation for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A
I can only confirm admin reservation for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B if it is not the case that the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case A
effects: Once I confirm admin reservation for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B, it is the case that the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case A

assign_external_partner.description: assign an external partner B to a referral case A
preconditions: I can only assign an external partner B to a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and B is available
I can only assign an external partner B to a referral case A if it is not the case that the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case A
effects: Once I assign an external partner B to a referral case A, it is the case that the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case A and A requires an administrative hold
Once I assign an external partner B to a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

perform_clinical_review_with_clinician.description: perform clinical review for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C
preconditions: I can only perform clinical review for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C if it is the case that the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case A and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A and C shift is available
I can only perform clinical review for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C if it is not the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A
effects: Once I perform clinical review for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C, it is the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A
Once I perform clinical review for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C, it is not the case anymore that A requires an administrative hold

perform_clinical_review_for_timeslot.description: perform clinical review for a referral case A during an appointment timeslot B
preconditions: I can only perform clinical review for a referral case A during an appointment timeslot B if it is the case that a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and B is an allocated timeslot for A
I can only perform clinical review for a referral case A during an appointment timeslot B if it is not the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A
effects: Once I perform clinical review for a referral case A during an appointment timeslot B, it is the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A
Once I perform clinical review for a referral case A during an appointment timeslot B, it is not the case anymore that A requires an administrative hold

reserve_diagnostic_test.description: reserve a diagnostic test B for a referral case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a diagnostic test B for a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and B is available and B is required for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a diagnostic test B for a referral case A, it is the case that a diagnostic test B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a diagnostic test B for a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_diagnostic_test.description: release a diagnostic test B from a referral case A
preconditions: I can only release a diagnostic test B from a referral case A if it is the case that a diagnostic test B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a diagnostic test B from a referral case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a diagnostic test B from a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that a diagnostic test B is reserved for A

reserve_location.description: reserve a clinic location B for a referral case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinic location B for a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and B is available and B is required for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a clinic location B for a referral case A, it is the case that a location B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a clinic location B for a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_location.description: release a clinic location B from a referral case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinic location B from a referral case A if it is the case that a location B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a clinic location B from a referral case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinic location B from a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that a location B is reserved for A

reserve_medical_equipment.description: reserve a medical equipment B for a referral case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medical equipment B for a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and B is available and B is required for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a medical equipment B for a referral case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a medical equipment B for a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_medical_equipment.description: release a medical equipment B from a referral case A
preconditions: I can only release a medical equipment B from a referral case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a medical equipment B from a referral case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a medical equipment B from a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

allocate_referral_reason_to_case.description: allocate a referral reason B to a referral case A
preconditions: I can only allocate a referral reason B to a referral case A if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and B is an available referral reason and A has the referral reason B
effects: Once I allocate a referral reason B to a referral case A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I allocate a referral reason B to a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available referral reason

release_referral_reason_from_case.description: release a referral reason B from a referral case A
preconditions: I can only release a referral reason B from a referral case A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release a referral reason B from a referral case A, it is the case that B is an available referral reason
Once I release a referral reason B from a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

create_service_appointment.description: create a service appointment for a referral case A with a clinical service B and a diagnostic test C at a clinic location D
preconditions: I can only create a service appointment for a referral case A with a clinical service B and a diagnostic test C at a clinic location D if it is the case that a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and a diagnostic test C is reserved for A and a location D is reserved for A and B is available and B matches the case A
I can only create a service appointment for a referral case A with a clinical service B and a diagnostic test C at a clinic location D if it is not the case that the appointment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I create a service appointment for a referral case A with a clinical service B and a diagnostic test C at a clinic location D, it is the case that a service appointment for B is created for A and the appointment for A is confirmed
Once I create a service appointment for a referral case A with a clinical service B and a diagnostic test C at a clinic location D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

create_appointment_with_resources.description: create an appointment with resources for a referral case A using a clinical service B, a medical equipment C, and an ancillary resource D
preconditions: I can only create an appointment with resources for a referral case A using a clinical service B, a medical equipment C, and an ancillary resource D if it is the case that a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and C is reserved for A and D is an available ancillary resource and B is available and B matches the case A and D is required for the case A

I can only create an appointment with resources for a referral case A using a clinical service B, a medical equipment C, and an ancillary resource D if it is not the case that the appointment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I create an appointment with resources for a referral case A using a clinical service B, a medical equipment C, and an ancillary resource D, it is the case that a service appointment for B is created for A and the appointment for A is confirmed and A has an escalation flag and A requires an administrative hold

Once I create an appointment with resources for a referral case A using a clinical service B, a medical equipment C, and an ancillary resource D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is an available ancillary resource

resolve_escalation_after_confirmation.description: resolve escalation for a referral case A after confirmation using a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C
preconditions: I can only resolve escalation for a referral case A after confirmation using a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C if it is the case that the appointment for A is confirmed and A has an escalation flag and a diagnostic test B is reserved for A and a location C is reserved for A
effects: Once I resolve escalation for a referral case A after confirmation using a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case anymore that A requires an administrative hold

grant_clinical_authorization.description: grant clinical authorization for a referral case A using a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C within a care pathway unit D
preconditions: I can only grant clinical authorization for a referral case A using a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C within a care pathway unit D if it is the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A and the appointment for A is confirmed and a diagnostic test B is reserved for A and a location C is reserved for A and A is assigned to the organizational unit D

I can only grant clinical authorization for a referral case A using a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C within a care pathway unit D if it is not the case that A requires an administrative hold and it is not the case that clinical authorization is granted for A
effects: Once I grant clinical authorization for a referral case A using a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C within a care pathway unit D, it is the case that clinical authorization is granted for A

grant_authorization_with_escalation_rout.description: grant authorization for a referral case A with a medical equipment B due to a referral reason C through an escalation unit D
preconditions: I can only grant authorization for a referral case A with a medical equipment B due to a referral reason C through an escalation unit D if it is the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A and the appointment for A is confirmed and B is reserved for A and C is allocated to A and A is assigned to the organizational unit D

I can only grant authorization for a referral case A with a medical equipment B due to a referral reason C through an escalation unit D if it is not the case that clinical authorization is granted for A
effects: Once I grant authorization for a referral case A with a medical equipment B due to a referral reason C through an escalation unit D, it is the case that clinical authorization is granted for A and A requires an administrative hold

finalize_appointment.description: finalize appointment for a referral case A with a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C
preconditions: I can only finalize appointment for a referral case A with a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C if it is the case that clinical authorization is granted for A and A requires an administrative hold and a diagnostic test B is reserved for A and a location C is reserved for A
effects: Once I finalize appointment for a referral case A with a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C, it is the case that the appointment for A is finalized

Once I finalize appointment for a referral case A with a diagnostic test B at a clinic location C, it is not the case anymore that A requires an administrative hold and it is not the case anymore that clinical authorization is obtained for A and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

reconfirm_clinical_authorization.description: reconfirm clinical authorization for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C
preconditions: I can only reconfirm clinical authorization for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C if it is the case that the appointment for A is finalized and clinical authorization is granted for A and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A and C shift is available
I can only reconfirm clinical authorization for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C if it is not the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A
effects: Once I reconfirm clinical authorization for a referral case A with an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C, it is the case that clinical authorization is obtained for A

record_patient_notification_sent.description: record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B
preconditions: I can only record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B if it is the case that clinical authorization is granted for A and clinical authorization is obtained for A and B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A

I can only record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B if it is not the case that A requires an administrative hold and it is not the case that patient notification is sent for A
effects: Once I record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B, it is the case that patient notification is sent for A

record_patient_notification_sent_via_par.description: record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A via an external partner B
preconditions: I can only record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A via an external partner B if it is the case that clinical authorization is granted for A and clinical authorization is obtained for A and B is available

I can only record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A via an external partner B if it is not the case that A requires an administrative hold and it is not the case that patient notification is sent for A
effects: Once I record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A via an external partner B, it is the case that patient notification is sent for A
Once I record that patient notification is sent for a referral case A via an external partner B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

reserve_timeslot_for_case.description: reserve an appointment timeslot B for a referral case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an appointment timeslot B for a referral case A if it is the case that patient notification is sent for A and B is available and A has a timeslot preference for B
effects: Once I reserve an appointment timeslot B for a referral case A, it is the case that A has a subtype that is compatible with B
Once I reserve an appointment timeslot B for a referral case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

record_clinician_confirmation_for_timesl.description: record clinician confirmation for an appointment timeslot C with a referral subtype b A and a referral subtype a referral subtype a B
preconditions: I can only record clinician confirmation for an appointment timeslot C with a referral subtype b A and a referral subtype a referral subtype a B if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and triage for A is complete and C is a candidate timeslot for A and B has a subtype that is compatible with C

I can only record clinician confirmation for an appointment timeslot C with a referral subtype b A and a referral subtype a referral subtype a B if it is not the case that C is an allocated timeslot for A
effects: Once I record clinician confirmation for an appointment timeslot C with a referral subtype b A and a referral subtype a referral subtype a B, it is the case that C is an allocated timeslot for A

notify_patient_of_appointment.description: notify patient of appointment for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C
preconditions: I can only notify patient of appointment for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C if it is the case that the referral case A is registered and triage for A is complete and clinical authorization is obtained for A and patient notification is sent for A and B is assigned as the admin coordinator for A and C shift is available

I can only notify patient of appointment for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C if it is not the case that the patient for A has been notified of the appointment
effects: Once I notify patient of appointment for a referral case A by an admin coordinator B during a clinician availability C, it is the case that the patient for A has been notified of the appointment

finalize_referral_case_record.description: finalize the record for a referral case A
preconditions: I can only finalize the record for a referral case A if it is the case that intake checks for A are completed and the referral case A is registered and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and the appointment for A is confirmed and clinical authorization is granted for A and patient notification is sent for A and clinical authorization is obtained for A
I can only finalize the record for a referral case A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize the record for a referral case A, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_referral_case_with_timeslot.description: finalize the record for a referral case A with an appointment timeslot B
preconditions: I can only finalize the record for a referral case A with an appointment timeslot B if it is the case that triage for A is complete and the referral case A is registered and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and the appointment for A is confirmed and clinical authorization is granted for A and patient notification is sent for A and clinical authorization is obtained for A and B is an allocated timeslot for A
I can only finalize the record for a referral case A with an appointment timeslot B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize the record for a referral case A with an appointment timeslot B, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_referral_case_after_notificatio.description: finalize the record for a referral case A after patient notification
preconditions: I can only finalize the record for a referral case A after patient notification if it is the case that triage for A is complete and the referral case A is registered and a specialist is assigned to the referral case A and the appointment for A is confirmed and clinical authorization is granted for A and patient notification is sent for A and clinical authorization is obtained for A and the patient for A has been notified of the appointment
I can only finalize the record for a referral case A after patient notification if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize the record for a referral case A after patient notification, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.assign_specialist_to_case: assign specialist provider {?specialist_provider} to referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.unassign_specialist_from_case: unassign specialist provider {?specialist_provider} from referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_admin_coordinator: reserve admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator} for referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.release_admin_coordinator: release admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator} from referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_admin_reservation: confirm admin reservation for referral case {?referral_case} with admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator}
action_nl_templates.assign_external_partner: assign external partner {?external_partner} to referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.perform_clinical_review_with_clinician: perform clinical review for referral case {?referral_case} with admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator} during clinician availability {?clinician_availability}
action_nl_templates.perform_clinical_review_for_timeslot: perform clinical review for referral case {?referral_case} during appointment timeslot {?appointment_timeslot}
action_nl_templates.reserve_diagnostic_test: reserve diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} for referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.release_diagnostic_test: release diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} from referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_location: reserve clinic location {?clinic_location} for referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.release_location: release clinic location {?clinic_location} from referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_medical_equipment: reserve medical equipment {?medical_equipment} for referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.release_medical_equipment: release medical equipment {?medical_equipment} from referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.allocate_referral_reason_to_case: allocate referral reason {?referral_reason} to referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.release_referral_reason_from_case: release referral reason {?referral_reason} from referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.create_service_appointment: create a service appointment for referral case {?referral_case} with clinical service {?clinical_service} and diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} at clinic location {?clinic_location}
action_nl_templates.create_appointment_with_resources: create an appointment with resources for referral case {?referral_case} using clinical service {?clinical_service}, medical equipment {?medical_equipment}, and ancillary resource {?ancillary_resource}
action_nl_templates.resolve_escalation_after_confirmation: resolve escalation for referral case {?referral_case} after confirmation using diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} at clinic location {?clinic_location}
action_nl_templates.grant_clinical_authorization: grant clinical authorization for referral case {?referral_case} using diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} at clinic location {?clinic_location} within care pathway unit {?care_pathway_variant}
action_nl_templates.grant_authorization_with_escalation_rout: grant authorization for referral case {?referral_case} with medical equipment {?medical_equipment} due to referral reason {?referral_reason} through escalation unit {?escalation_channel}
action_nl_templates.finalize_appointment: finalize appointment for referral case {?referral_case} with diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} at clinic location {?clinic_location}
action_nl_templates.reconfirm_clinical_authorization: reconfirm clinical authorization for referral case {?referral_case} with admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator} during clinician availability {?clinician_availability}
action_nl_templates.record_patient_notification_sent: record that patient notification is sent for referral case {?referral_case} by admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator}
action_nl_templates.record_patient_notification_sent_via_par: record that patient notification is sent for referral case {?referral_case} via external partner {?external_partner}
action_nl_templates.reserve_timeslot_for_case: reserve appointment timeslot {?appointment_timeslot} for referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.record_clinician_confirmation_for_timesl: record clinician confirmation for appointment timeslot {?appointment_timeslot} with referral subtype b {?referral_subtype_b} and referral subtype a {?referral_subtype_a}
action_nl_templates.notify_patient_of_appointment: notify patient of appointment for referral case {?referral_case} by admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator} during clinician availability {?clinician_availability}
action_nl_templates.finalize_referral_case_record: finalize the record for referral case {?referral_case}
action_nl_templates.finalize_referral_case_with_timeslot: finalize the record for referral case {?referral_case} with appointment timeslot {?appointment_timeslot}
action_nl_templates.finalize_referral_case_after_notificatio: finalize the record for referral case {?referral_case} after patient notification

predicate_nl_templates.assigned_specialist: the referral case {?referral_case} is assigned to the specialist provider {?specialist_provider}
predicate_nl_templates.case_specialist_assigned: a specialist is assigned to the referral case {?referral_case}
predicate_nl_templates.admin_coordinator_reserved_flag: the admin coordinator reserved flag is set for the referral case {?referral_case}
predicate_nl_templates.diagnostic_test_reserved: a diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} is reserved for {?referral_case}
predicate_nl_templates.service_appointment_created: a service appointment for {?clinical_service} is created for {?referral_case}
predicate_nl_templates.patient_notified_of_appointment: the patient for {?referral_case} has been notified of the appointment
predicate_nl_templates.eligible_specialist_for_case: {?specialist_provider} is an eligible specialist for the case {?referral_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_organizational_unit: {?referral_case} is assigned to the organizational unit {?organizational_unit}
predicate_nl_templates.subtype_timeslot_compatible: {?referral_case} has a subtype that is compatible with {?appointment_timeslot}
predicate_nl_templates.admin_coordinator_assigned: {?admin_coordinator} is assigned as the admin coordinator for {?referral_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_specialist_from_case: unassign a specialist provider {?specialist_provider} from a referral case {?referral_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_admin_coordinator: release an admin coordinator {?admin_coordinator} from a referral case {?referral_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_diagnostic_test: release a diagnostic test {?diagnostic_test} from a referral case {?referral_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.create_appointment_with_resources: create an appointment with resources for a referral case {?referral_case} using a clinical service {?clinical_service}, a medical equipment {?medical_equipment}, and an ancillary resource {?ancillary_resource}

action_nl_templates_indef.grant_authorization_with_escalation_rout: grant authorization for a referral case {?referral_case} with a medical equipment {?medical_equipment} due to a referral reason {?referral_reason} through an escalation unit {?escalation_channel}

action_nl_templates_indef.record_patient_notification_sent_via_par: record that patient notification is sent for a referral case {?referral_case} via an external partner {?external_partner}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a referral case or a specialist provider or a clinical service or a clinic location or a diagnostic test or a medical equipment or a admin coordinator or a external partner or a appointment timeslot or a clinician availability or a ancillary resource or a referral reason or a organizational unit is also a object
Everything that is a care pathway unit or a escalation unit is also a organizational unit
Everything that is a referral subtype a or a referral subtype b is also a referral case
